_comment: Worked example for a consumer migrating an existing composed file. The first region is preserved into a named local block; the second is discarded outright. Update the `content` strings to match your file's actual legacy regions byte-for-byte (including trailing newlines if present).

regions.content: Run `make deploy` after merging to main. Smoke tests live in tests/smoke/.
